title: Identify Aveva As The HMI Platform Used In UPS Buildings
summary: Use the referenced training slide and transcript segment to verify that the source identifies Aveva as the HMI platform used in UPS buildings. This runbook is limited to source-backed platform identification and does not provide HMI operating instructions.
when_to_use: Use when you need to confirm, from this training source only, which HMI platform is named for the described UPS building environment.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to operate Aveva.
Do not use this runbook to infer specific HMI screens, controls, buttons, workflows, or navigation paths.
Do not use this runbook when a task requires actual HMI operating steps.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Review the cited training slide and transcript and record the HMI platform named in the source.

safety_notes: This source segment supports platform identification only.
Do not invent HMI screen names, buttons, or workflows because they are not provided in this segment.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the training video segment or extracted slide

access_required: Access to the training video segment or extracted slide
Access to the transcript for the segment
system_preconditions: The reviewer can open the overview training slide associated with training_video_day1_segment_0005.

visual_references.description: Overview training slide showing the core OptiSweep system elements, including the Aveva HMI label.

steps.title: Open the overview slide and locate the Aveva HMI label
steps.purpose: Identify the HMI platform label directly from the architecture overview image in the source.
steps.instruction: Open the overview training slide for the cited segment and locate the label for Aveva HMI in the architecture diagram.
steps.expected_result: The overview slide visibly includes an Aveva HMI label among the core system elements.
steps.healthy_condition: The slide shows Aveva HMI as one of the named components in the OptiSweep environment overview.
steps.failure_condition: The reviewer cannot locate the overview slide or cannot identify the Aveva HMI label on the provided artifact.

actions.label: Review overview architecture slide
actions.exact_action: Open the overview training slide and locate the Aveva HMI label in the architecture diagram.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The core elements architecture slide showing UPS Chat, tote handling equipment, AGVs, hospital controller, OptiSweep software, sorter, printer, and the Aveva HMI label.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the referenced slide or artifact is unavailable.
Escalate if the image is too unclear to confirm the Aveva HMI label from the source artifact.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Overview slide shows UPS Chat, tote tipper/tote tip stations, Geek+ AGVs, hospital controller, OptiSweep Software, sorter, printer, and Aveva HMI; transcript also mentions scan tunnel.

steps.title: Confirm the transcript statement about Aveva usage
steps.purpose: Validate the platform identification using the explicit transcript statement from the same source segment.
steps.instruction: Review the transcript or evidence summary for the cited segment and confirm that it states UPS in all their buildings uses Aveva for HMIs.
steps.expected_result: The transcript evidence explicitly states that UPS in all their buildings uses Aveva for HMIs.
steps.healthy_condition: The transcript contains a direct statement identifying Aveva as the HMI platform used in UPS buildings.
steps.failure_condition: The transcript does not contain the cited statement or the reviewer cannot verify it from the provided packet evidence.

actions.label: Review transcript evidence
actions.exact_action: Confirm from the transcript that UPS in all their buildings uses Aveva for HMIs.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the transcript for the cited segment is not available.
Escalate if the source wording cannot be verified from the provided evidence.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: UPS in all their buildings uses Aveva for HMIs.

steps.healthy_condition: The recorded result matches the slide and transcript evidence from the cited segment.
steps.failure_condition: The recorded platform name differs from the source evidence or is left ambiguous.

actions.label: Document identified platform
actions.exact_action: Record Aveva as the HMI platform named in this source segment.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the overview slide as the visual reference supporting the recorded identification of Aveva HMI.
